So odd n!! cannot divide 2012!! because odd n!! contains odd numbers not present in 2012!!. Wait, 2012!! is product of even numbers only. So any odd n!! contains odd numbers, which are not factors of 2012!!. So odd n!! cannot divide 2012!!. So only even n <= 2012 count. That's 1006. So correct answer is 1006.
